'''âm-n-k-f''' ('''kamankefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:janny|janny]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:janny|janny]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-n-k-f
|-
! Lemma
| kamankefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimankefoko|thimankefoko]] || [[word:jimankefoko|jimankefoko]] || [[word:shimankefoko|shimankefoko]] || [[word:kimankefoko|kimankefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumankefoko|thuthumankefoko]] || [[word:jujumankefoko|jujumankefoko]] || [[word:shushumankefoko|shushumankefoko]] || [[word:kukumankefoko|kukumankefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumankefoko|thumankefoko]] || [[word:jumankefoko|jumankefoko]] || [[word:shumankefoko|shumankefoko]] || [[word:kumankefoko|kumankefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumankefoko|thumankefoko]] || [[word:jumankefoko|jumankefoko]] || [[word:shumankefoko|shumankefoko]] || [[word:kumankefoko|kumankefoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomankefoko|thomankefoko]] || [[word:jomankefoko|jomankefoko]] || [[word:shomankefoko|shomankefoko]] || [[word:komankefoko|komankefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomankefoko|thomankefoko]] || [[word:jomankefoko|jomankefoko]] || [[word:shomankefoko|shomankefoko]] || [[word:komankefoko|komankefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmankefoko|thĂŠmankefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠmankefoko|jĂŠmankefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠmankefoko|shĂŠmankefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠmankefoko|kĂŠmankefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamankefoko|thathamankefoko]] || [[word:jajamankefoko|jajamankefoko]] || [[word:shashamankefoko|shashamankefoko]] || [[word:kakamankefoko|kakamankefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamankefoko|thamankefoko]] || [[word:jamankefoko|jamankefoko]] || [[word:shamankefoko|shamankefoko]] || [[word:kamankefoko|kamankefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamankefoko|thamankefoko]] || [[word:jamankefoko|jamankefoko]] || [[word:shamankefoko|shamankefoko]] || [[word:kamankefoko|kamankefoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
